creator: freebsd-ports@charlieroot.de
text:
portversion / pkg are too verbose:

[helmut@BSDHelmut ~]$ sudo portversion > /dev/null
[Reading data from pkg(8) ... - 329 packages found - done]
[helmut@BSDHelmut ~]$

Should be

[helmut@BSDHelmut964 ~]$ sudo portversion > /dev/null
[helmut@BSDHelmut964 ~]$

How-To-Repeat: Install pkg, run portversion.
